description_long: This is a modern L-shaped kitchen cabinetry set featuring a combination of base cabinets, wall cabinets, and a tall pantry unit. The cabinetry is finished in muted pastel green and light wood tones, with a white marble countertop and backsplash. The base cabinets include drawers and doors, while the wall cabinets provide additional storage above the work surface. Integrated appliances such as an oven and refrigerator are visible, and the peninsula counter extends into the room, supported by a single metal leg. The cabinetry is enclosed on three sides by partial-height walls, creating a semi-private kitchen nook. The overall design is sleek and minimalist, with flat panel doors and subtle hardware.
description: A modern L-shaped kitchen cabinetry set with pastel green and wood finishes, marble countertops, and integrated appliances, enclosed by partial-height walls.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full cabinetry layout, marble countertop, integrated appliances, and peninsula counter.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the partial-height wall with a window and the edge of the peninsula counter.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the solid exterior of the partial-height wall, with no cabinetry visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the back of the partial-height wall and a glimpse of the window and tall pantry cabinet.
attribute_cabinet_type: L-shaped kitchen base and wall cabinet set with tall pantry
attribute_door_configuration: combination of double door, single door, and drawers
